text: I feel a curious sense of anticipation as I approach and then immerse myself in a space dedicated to research and development. The vibrant colors and modern displays evoke excitement and contemplation. The room seems to invite me to ponder not just technological advancement but my relationship with these evolving ideas—how we, as humans, adapt, resist, or collaborate with what is new. There is both a slight nervousness at the newness and an intellectual thrill at the shared pursuit of knowledge.
